notes: v0.6.4 gh issue #45 — 6 UX fixes: toast system, confirm/prompt dialogs, fix-version dropdown, ART search+persist, inline expand, home button
SNow Hub: added dedicated CRG Configuration tab, improved CHG clone hydration/migration, and fixed PRB Jira preview/create behavior.
Sprint Dashboard standup parity: added Board Walk, Person Walk, embedded DSU Board, roster scope, and persisted person-walk planning.
Standup exact parity: replaced inferred standup behavior with the live ToolBox board-walk, DSU-style person-walk, legacy DSU Board JQL/persistence, and Team Dashboard project persistence.
Completed remaining Team Dashboard parity: Defects, Planning, Pipeline, and Pointing now mirror the live ToolBox workflows and the full client suite/build passed.

Dashboard UX overhaul: fixed hierarchy-safe Planning/Pipeline loading, restored sticky shared tabs by removing overflow traps, redesigned Team Dashboard Pointing for faster minimal-context estimation, and aligned standalone Story Pointing/Pipeline shells.

Global sticky-tab fix: constrained the shared app shell so mainContent owns scrolling again and removed the remaining Reports Hub root scroll trap that kept PrimaryTabs disappearing behind the top bar.

Settings persistence fix: moved Sprint Dashboard project/board/tab selection into the shared settings model, cleared stale board selections when projects change, and expanded backup/reset coverage to include durable legacy localStorage keys.

DSU Board filter UX redesign: replaced long multi-select chip rows with compact dropdown menus with checkbox options and active counts, preserved single-select dropdowns for fix version and PI, and covered the saved-filter edge case in tests.

Standup Person Walk visual refresh: restored original-style follow-through and assignee standup cards, added richer draft preview styling, and fixed the board-walk status toggle to behave correctly across batched clicks.

Standup Sprint/Roster planning: added a persisted Team Dashboard roster tab, shared daily per-person planning state with yesterday fallback, Sprint-vs-Roster standup scope switching, plan-held/plan-shifted follow-through, and DSU Board roster sourcing from the shared roster.

Team Dashboard scope selector: added persisted Sprint / PI / Fix Version selection across every tab, defaulted new loads to the active sprint, replaced board ID badges with board names, and updated the visible dashboard title to Team Dashboard.

Team Dashboard roster importer: added spreadsheet-style paste parsing with preview, merge/replace import flows, persisted roster metadata, same-size roster reload protection for standup, and non-colliding roster member IDs.

Art View dependency parity: replaced the simplified dependency table with a Blueprint-backed SVG dependency graph, added legacy focus/filter behaviors and detail drawer navigation, exposed configurable dependency link types in ART settings, and closed the remaining inward-link placeholder gap.

Manual self-update repair: ZIP installs now stage beside the live install, swap directories in place, preserve install-root artifacts, roll back and relaunch the intact install on swap failures, and use down-then-up restart polling in Admin Hub.

My Issues status transitions: fixed the shared Jira POST helper so successful 204 or blank responses resolve cleanly instead of throwing Unexpected end of JSON input, covering My Issues and other Jira transition surfaces.

Updater snapshot staging: fixed exe-mode detection to treat process.pkg as truthy, so compiled builds resolve the real install directory from process.execPath and no longer try to mkdir inside C:\snapshot during self-update.

Admin Hub updater reliability: restart/update handoffs now close the live HTTP listener before relaunching, replacement launches carry a hidden --restart-handoff flag for fail-fast startup, and the client waits for the expected /api/proxy-status version before declaring success.

Art View PI launch defaults: Program Increment options now auto-load on launch, the dropdown defaults to the PI whose embedded date range covers today, manual reload preserves deliberate selections, and autocomplete still works when stored teams do not include project keys.

Durable NodeToolbox updater: replaced in-place executable replacement with stable VBS/BAT bootstrappers, current.txt active-version pointer, versions/<version>/nodetoolbox.exe payloads, legacy EXE handoff, one user-facing release zip, and hardened update download handling.

PI Review hard-commit boundary line: added one persisted yellow marker between rows, parser/writer round-trip support, UI controls for setting/clearing the line, and regression coverage for reload/removal behavior.

PI Review Confluence sync: added team-only PI Review page loading, capacity snapshot sync and fallback, committed-point totals, row move tools for placing the commitment line, Confluence version-conflict retry, and full-width table markup preservation.

PI Review PDF export: added screenshot-style per-team PDF download covering capacity, PI Review table, commitment line, and weekly confidence history, plus multi-page PDF pagination and edit-mode export safeguards.

PI Review Jira reconciliation: added load/save Jira sync for feature summary, priority, linked dependencies/risks, and customfield_10111 estimates, introduced unlimited custom grouping lines plus Stretch Goals styling, and added current-panel Ignore Edits recovery with regression coverage.

PI Review line UX follow-up: removed the separate custom-line manager, made Stretch Goals and custom lines use the same row-level toggle flow, added inline custom-line text/color editing, and made the Stretch Goals button toggle the line off when clicked again.

PI Review Confluence round-trip fix: fallback parsing now preserves custom grouping lines and their colors after Confluence strips private markers, and Team Capacity saves replace the existing rendered block instead of duplicating it.

PI Review export enhancement: added a high-resolution PNG export beside PDF, shared the panel snapshot pipeline, covered the new toolbar action and export helper, and switched image downloads to Blob URLs for memory-safe cleanup.

PI Review Jira date pills: defaulted Target Start and Target End to customfield_10101/customfield_10102, reused Jira duedate for Due Date, kept ART settings overrides for other Jira instances, rendered date pills inside the PI Review Feature cell, and covered the new settings persistence and PI Review rendering paths.

PI Review fist-of-five contrast refresh: increased neutral stroke contrast, darkened folded fingers, added a subtle icon shadow, and made the selected confidence option more visible in both light and dark themes.

PI Review Confluence fetch diagnostics: turned ENOTFOUND proxy failures into actionable Confluence host guidance and kept the resolved page ID visible in the PI Review panel even when the page load fails.

PI Review UX split: moved PI Review authoring into a new Team Dashboard tab backed by the shared Confluence editor, made ART View readout-first with a direct Team Dashboard handoff, added wrapper coverage, and fixed export mode restoration for readout panels.

Admin Hub version check hardening: replaced the single GitHub API timeout path with parallel GitHub API and public release-redirect probes, returned clearer fallback messaging, and added integration coverage for API success, redirect fallback, and dual-failure cases.

Feature Review direct status transitions: added inline Jira workflow transition loading and save actions in the Team Dashboard fix panel, refreshed feature data after saves, and covered the new helper and UI flow with focused tests.
Rewrote README.md to document the current NodeToolbox product surface, integrations, platform architecture, setup flow, validation commands, and local release pipeline.

Business Helper sticky-tab fix: replaced transform-based tool text scaling with zoom in the shared app shell, added a regression test to guard the sticky-safe rule, and documented the Simple Search tab-bar scroll fix in the changelog.

PI Review confidence follow-up: reversed the hand emphasis so raised fingers read first, added decimal confidence votes with 0.1 precision, rendered fractional votes as partial-finger fills, and preserved decimal values through Confluence round-trips.

Team Dashboard PI Review capacity workspace: added a livelier capacity summary above the shared PI Review editor and unified the Team Dashboard capacity source so the displayed snapshot and saved Confluence capacity summary stay in sync.

PI Review and capacity consolidation: removed the separate Capacity tabs, embedded Team Dashboard capacity editing directly into PI Review, removed the ART-only capacity store/tab path, and kept Art View PI Review as the saved-capacity readout with Team Dashboard as the authoring home.

PI Review styling refresh: switched read-only yes/no fields to checkmark badges, added softer glow-coded Jira date pills and pill-style action buttons, boosted table visual contrast, and kept fist-of-five icon contrast theme-aware in both light and dark mode.

PI Review export cleanup: moved tall PNG/PDF capture onto an off-screen absolute export host to avoid white seam artifacts, tagged export clones for styling, and tightened Stretch Goals/custom grouping line presentation in exports without changing the live UI.

PI Review screenshot export simplification: removed the PDF export path and jsPDF dependency, renamed export-only data markers, kept PNG as the literal screenshot-style export, and dropped the export-only divider styling so Stretch Goals/custom lines match the live app more closely.
Home card sizing fix: made sortable Home card slots full height so shorter cards like My Issues stretch to match neighboring cards, and added regression coverage for the uniform card slot wrapper.

Admin Hub enterprise rule enforcement: made built-in rule toggles drive real Hygiene and Feature Review validation, added custom required-field rules with issue-type scope and severity, and introduced three default feature schedule rules for overdue Target Start, Target End, and Due Date states.

PI Review fix version pill: fetched Jira fixVersions for feature reconciliation, added a Fix Version pill beside the existing schedule pills, and covered both the Jira helper query and PI Review rendering path with regression tests.

PI Review Stretch Goals divider visibility: raised the commitment-boundary row selector specificity so the bold yellow band and dark text win over zebra striping and stay readable in the live table again.

Team Dashboard Releases Rovo workflow: added a passphrase-gated release-notes prompt builder, visible unlock fallback when the hotkey does not fire, strict JSON response parsing, inline release-notes table rendering, and regression coverage for the helper contract and Releases tab flow.

SNow Release Management relay 403 fix: routed change_request reads through the direct proxy path so configured ServiceNow credentials handle those table queries instead of the relay page context, and added hook coverage for the fetch options.

Feature Review completion weighting: replaced done-only feature progress with weighted status-based completion across all child records, including off-train work, and added blueprint hierarchy regression coverage for the new rollup math.

PI Review follow-up: changed the Stretch Goals divider to a flat darker 80 percent yellow fill with dark text, replaced the long multi-team PI Review stack with team tabs that keep panels mounted across tab switches, extracted a shared DOM-to-PNG exporter, and added Release Notes PNG export in Team Dashboard.

Release Notes export polish: gave the exported release-notes block a real themed card surface to fix PNG color drift, excluded the export button from the captured image, and restyled the action as a rounded pill button.

SnowHub CRG multi-environment fix: changed create to submit one CHG per enabled environment with environment-specific config item, impacted-persons-aware value, and planned dates, passed live environment values from the tab, lowered Snow lookup search to one character, and stabilized the hook/tab regression suites.

Stretch Goals divider readability follow-up: replaced the heavier filled PI Review boundary row with the same subtle band treatment used by custom grouping lines, while keeping the reserved yellow palette exclusive to Stretch Goals.

Business Helper stablization funding table: added a new Stablization tab with editable funding rows, automatic Testing and Total formulas, browser-local draft persistence, footer totals for every USD column, and focused Business Helper regression coverage.

Business Helper settings and mapping: added a Settings tab for Stablization column input configuration and dropdown option lists, persisted Simple Search to Stablization field mappings, enabled sending Jira results into mapped table rows with toast feedback, and expanded Business Helper regression coverage across settings, mapping, and dropdown rendering.

Business Helper Stablization follow-up: improved table column sizing with wrapping-friendly cells, defaulted blank starter and new rows to a single dropdown option when configured, and preserved direct Jira browse links for Simple Search data imported into the funding table.

Business Helper Stablization resize follow-up: replaced per-cell textarea resizing with persistent header drag handles, stored per-column widths in Business Helper settings, kept wrapped auto-growing text cells, and validated the full client suite and build.

PI Review pasted Jira date updates: added a paste-driven Jira date updater for Target Start, Target End, and Due Date, refreshed PI Review feature pills after apply, and covered the parser/helper/UI path with targeted tests plus client build/lint validation.

Feature Review legacy Jira assignee compatibility: added fallback from user-search query to username, preserved accountId/name/key selection tokens for direct hygiene fixes, rejected malformed user identifiers, and covered the path with focused tests plus client build/lint validation.

Feature Review assignee false-positive fix: requested assignee in the Jira feature fetch used for hygiene evaluation, added regression coverage so assigned features no longer trip the no-assignee flag, and revalidated the Feature Review tests plus client build/lint.
Team Dashboard multi-team switching fix: preserved the active saved team when another profile is removed, prevented stale autosave during team handoff, and added focused regression coverage.

Reports Hub overhaul: replaced weak table-only tabs with scorecards and rollups, added paginated Jira search with richer fields and risk-labeled risk loading, shifted throughput to six-month month-based comparisons, fixed due-date timezone handling, and validated with focused Reports Hub tests plus client lint/build.

Reports Hub PI dropdown fix: normalized Jira PI custom field object values, matched equivalent PI labels with and without date-range suffixes, added PI-like fix version fallback for sprint-backed tabs, and validated with focused Reports Hub tests plus client lint/build.

Reports Hub KPI/default PI fix: made the hero KPI cards follow the selected PI and team filters, auto-selected the current dated PI once options loaded, aligned the feature report team count with the filtered scope, and validated with focused Reports Hub tests plus client lint/build.
